response.justification: Szabo meets the 15-year experience baseline and has solid full-stack engineering credentials with recent exposure to AI infrastructure work (MCP, AI-agent frameworks). However, the role demands demonstrated AI platform/product expertise and director-level strategic technical leadership. His background emphasizes breadth across web, infrastructure, and tooling rather than deep AI strategy, and his current Staff-level title undershoots the Principal/Director-level impact expected. The recent MCP involvement is a potential signal but lacks clarity on depth or strategic AI vision.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, spanning full-stack, infrastructure, and embedded systems
Proven ability to inspire and share knowledge through workshops, talks, and mentoring (refactoring dojos, web internals course, Selenium training)
Current exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP code generators, AI-agent frameworks) and hands-on cloud expertise (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; no demonstrated expertise building AI products or platforms beyond recent tooling involvement
Career trajectory shows Staff-level technical work rather than Principal/Director-level strategic leadership, technical vision, or high-impact innovation
Limited evidence of strategic advisory work with customers/partners, platform architecture thinking, or C-level technical influence required for director-level role
